_provenance.stage: Stage 6 — Synthesis (retroactive rebuild from Codex Stage 3)
version_history: v4 (2026-05-17): retroactive editorial pass. Stage 3 (Codex) FAS=56 with 6 verified claims. KEY CATEGORY CORRECTION: 'Malay Reserve Land' (INCORRECT) replaced with 'Malay Agricultural Settlement land with Malay-only ownership restrictions' (Kampung Baru is officially MAS, not MRL). 'Zero ground broken in 40 years' (OVERSTATED — PKB has completed projects including a 10-storey commercial building) corrected to 'comprehensive master redevelopment not delivered'. RM43B / 17,500 units / 121 hectares figures dropped as UNVERIFIED — replaced with PKB's verified 121.7-hectare operational area + 18,372-resident 2010 census. Kg Sungai Baru 'breakthrough shows it can move when terms are right' (MISLEADING) corrected to 'moved through acquisition, compensation, court processes and government intervention'. 3R-race issue: heritage and ownership protections preserved throughout.

revision_log: CORRECTED (Stage 3): INCORRECT — 'Malay Reserve Land status' → 'Malay Agricultural Settlement status with Malay-only ownership restrictions' (Kampung Baru is officially MAS, not MRL).

CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — '40 years, zero ground broken' → 'PKB lists completed Kampong Bharu-area projects; the larger master redevelopment has not been delivered' (PKB cites completed projects including a 10-storey commercial building).
REMOVED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — 'RM43 billion / 17,500 units' figures dropped pending PITPKB/PIPKB primary citation.
CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — '121 hectares' specified to PKB's 121.7 ha operational area / 300.73 acres.
ADDED (Stage 6 self-verified): PKB 2010 census 18,372 residents; 1899 founding.
CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'most valuable in KL on a per-square-foot basis' replaced with PKB's qualified valuation constraints language.
REPHRASED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'has not produced a single completed redevelopment block' → 'has delivered specific projects but not the comprehensive master redevelopment'.

REPHRASED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'individual consent from a large number of fragmented lot owners' replaced with PKB's specific constraint list (no fixed-percentage consent requirement; the constraints are categorical).

CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — Analogy 'Kg Sungai Baru breakthrough shows it can move when terms are right' → 'moved through a mix of acquisition, compensation, court processes and government intervention' (Stage 3: not consensus among 328 owners).
PRESERVED (Stage 3 VERIFIED): Master plan remains stalled; Kampung Sungai Baru 328 owners moved forward 2025; 121 ha beside KLCC core; PKB established 2012; four decades of redevelopment proposals.
